title: Resources – Duke Kunshan Center for Teaching and Learning
text:
Teaching Guides
Teaching Guides
This collection of teaching guides, developed by the CTL, offers practical, research-informed support for DKU faculty across a wide range of instructional topics. Whether you're designing a course, implementing inclusive teaching practices, advancing interdisciplinary teaching, enhancing student engagement, or refining assessment strategies, these resources offer adaptable guidance to enhance your teaching at DKU.
Templates and Guidelines
Templates and Guidelines
Find ready-to-use templates and institutional guidelines to make your teaching easier and more consistent. The latest DKU syllabus template, official PPT and letterhead designs, and links to helpful information by other offices are all included.
For New Faculty
For New Faculty
No matter if you're new to teaching or new to DKU, here are best pedagogical practices and teaching-related resources to get you started. ​
AI and Teaching
AI and Teaching
Explore resources for navigating AI and teaching in the DKU context, including the DKU Guide, CTL recommendations, faculty teaching cases, AI-related lunch sessions, and resource and tools available at DKU.
